mapper.sql: SELECT part_id, part_code, part_name, part_type, spec_model, unit, applicable_category, IFNULL(stock_min, 0) as stock_min, IFNULL(stock_max, 0) as stock_max, IFNULL(safety_stock, 0) as safety_stock, IFNULL(current_stock, 0) as current_stock, storage_location, supplier, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM dms_spare_part
mapper.select: SELECT part_code FROM dms_spare_part WHERE part_code LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY part_code DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: UPDATE dms_spare_part SET del_flag = '2' WHERE part_id IN #{partId}
mapper.select: WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status = '0' AND ( (stock_min > 0 AND current_stock <= stock_min) OR (stock_max > 0 AND current_stock >= stock_max) ) AND part_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partCode}, '%') AND part_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partName}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN current_stock <= 0 THEN 0 WHEN stock_min > 0 AND current_stock <= stock_min THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, current_stock ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE dms_spare_part SET stock_min = NULL, stock_max = NULL WHERE part_id = #{partId}
